titles.title: DataBallPy: Load, synchronize, and Analyse your Soccer Data

institution.institution_name: Department of Sports Sciences, University of Groningen, the Netherlands
Department of Sports Sciences, University of Groningen, the Netherlands
Centre for Sport Science and University Sports, University of Vienna, Austria
